name: Apollo Commercial Real Estate Finance, Inc.
business: Apollo Commercial Real Estate Finance, Inc. primarily originates, acquires, invests in and manages performing commercial first mortgage loans, subordinate financings and other commercial real estate-related debt investments.

exposures.sentence: Cybersecurity risks and cyber incidents may adversely affect our business by causing a disruption to our operations, a compromise or corruption of our confidential information, a misappropriation of funds, and/or damage to our business relationships, all of which could negatively impact our financial results.
Climate change-related risks and regulatory and other efforts to address potential climate change impacts could adversely affect our business.

catalysts.event: Entered into Asset Purchase and Sale Agreement with Athene
catalysts.sentence: On January 27, 2026, we entered into an Asset Purchase and Sale Agreement (the "Purchase Agreement") with Athene Holding Ltd. ("Athene").
